500: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
501:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
502:   if (!claimed) {
503:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
504:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
505:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
506:       return;
507:     }
508: 
509:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
510:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
511:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
512:           workspaceId,
513:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
514:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
515:         });
516:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
517:           workspaceId,
518:           deploymentId,
519:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
520:           payload: {
521:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
522:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
523:           },
524:         });
525:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
526:           deploymentId,
527:           status: 'failed',
528:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
529:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
530:         });
531:         return;
532:       }
533: 
534:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
535:     }
536:     return;
537:   }
538: 
539:   try {
540:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
541:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
542:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
543:         workspaceId,
544:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
545:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
546:       });
547:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
548:         workspaceId,
549:         deploymentId,
550:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
551:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
552:       });
553:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
554:         deploymentId,
555:         status: 'failed',
556:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
557:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
558:       });
559:       return;
560:     }
561: 
562:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
563:   } catch (error) {
564:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
565:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
566:       try {
567:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
568:       } catch (reconcileError) {
569:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
570:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
571:         }
572:       }
573:       return;
574:     }
575: 
576:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError || deployment?.cancelRequestedAt) {
577:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
578:       return;
579:     }
580: 
581:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
582:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
583:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
584:         true
585:       );
586:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
587: 
588:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
589:         workspaceId,
590:         errorCode: error.code,
591:         errorMessage: error.message,
592:         result: { rollback },
593:       });
594:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
595:         workspaceId,
596:         deploymentId,
597:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
598:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
599:       });
600:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
601:         deploymentId,
602:         status: 'failed',
603:         errorCode: error.code,
604:         errorMessage: error.message,
605:       });
606:       return;
607:     }
608: 
609:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
610:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
611:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
612:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
613:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
614:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
615:         return;
616:       }
617: 
618:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
619:         workspaceId,
620:         startedAt: null,
621:         finishedAt: null,
622:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
623:         errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
624:       });

626:         workspaceId,
627:         deploymentId,
628:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
629:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },
630:       });
631:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
632:     }
633: 
634:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
635:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
636:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
637:       true
638:     );
639:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
640: 
641:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
642:       workspaceId,
643:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
644:       errorMessage: message,
645:       result: { rollback },
646:     });
647:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
648:       workspaceId,
649:       deploymentId,
650:       eventType: 'deployment_failed',
651:       payload: {
652:         code: 'deployment_failed',
653:         message,
654:         rollback,
655:       },
656:     });
657:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
658:       deploymentId,
659:       status: 'failed',
660:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
661:       errorMessage: message,
662:     });
663:   }
664: }

666: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
667:   env: Env,
668:   workspaceId: string,
669:   deploymentId: string,
670:   maxCycles = 8
671: ): Promise<void> {
672:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
673:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
674:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
675:       return false;
676:     }
677: 
678:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
679:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
680:       return true;
681:     }
682: 
683:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
684:       return false;
685:     }
686: 
687:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
688:       workspaceId,
689:       startedAt: null,
690:       finishedAt: null,
691:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
692:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
693:     });
694:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
695:       workspaceId,
696:       deploymentId,
697:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
698:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
699:     });
700:     return true;
701:   }
702: 
703:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
704:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
705:     try {
706:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
707:     } catch (error) {
708:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
709:         try {
710:           const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
711:           if (latest?.status === 'running' && latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
712:             await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
713:             continue;
714:           }
715:         } catch {
716:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
717:         }
718:         return;
719:       }
720: 
721:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
722:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
723:         try {
724:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
725:           if (recovered) {
726:             continue;
727:           }
728:         } catch {
729:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
730:         }
731:       }
732:     }
733: 
734:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
735:     if (!latest) {
736:       return;
737:     }
738:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
739:       return;
740:     }
741:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
742:       continue;
743:     }
744:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
745:       return;
746:     }
747:   }
748: }

750: export async function cancelWorkspaceDeployment(
751:   env: Env,
752:   workspaceId: string,
753:   deploymentId: string
754: ): Promise<{ updated: boolean; deployment: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getWorkspaceDeployment>> }> {
755:   const result = await requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
756:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'cancelled') {
757:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
758:       workspaceId,
759:       deploymentId,
760:       eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
761:       payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
762:     });
763:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
764:       deploymentId,
765:       status: 'cancelled',
766:       errorCode: null,
767:       errorMessage: null,
768:     });
769:   }
770:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'running') {
771:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
772:       workspaceId,
773:       deploymentId,
774:       eventType: 'deployment_cancel_requested',
775:       payload: { cancelRequestedAt: result.deployment.cancelRequestedAt },
776:     });
777:   }
778:   return result;
779: }

781: export function shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error: unknown): boolean {
782:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
783:     return true;
784:   }
785:   if (isTransientFailure(error)) {
786:     return true;
787:   }
788: 
789:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
790:   return /(d1|database is locked|sqlite_busy|temporarily unavailable|connection reset)/i.test(message);

I reviewed the deployment-related changes across the worker API, DB layer/migration, queue/runner flow, flags/types, and tests.

- I don’t see any blocking correctness issues in this diff.
- The lifecycle looks internally consistent: create (`queued`) → claim (`running`) → terminal (`succeeded|failed|cancelled`), with event sequencing and workspace summary updates wired through.
- Idempotency handling for `POST /deploy` appears solid (payload hash conflict detection + reuse path).
- Queue + inline fallback behavior is coherent, and retry/cancel pathways are covered in tests.

One caveat from verification:
- I couldn’t run the worker test suite in this environment because `npm` is broken here (`Cannot find module 'node:path'` from the local npm installation), so this is a static review only.
